nasb.text: or has found what was lost and lied about it and sworn falsely, so that he sins in regard to any one of the things a man may do;

esv.text: or has found something lost and lied about it, swearing falsely—in any of all the things that people do and sin thereby—

cnv.text: 或是拾去人遺失的東西，卻欺騙人，起假誓，行了任何一件人常犯的罪，

ccb.text: 或捡到东西却矢口否认，或起假誓，或犯其他类似的罪，
